response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development experience, deep testing/TDD background, and developer-tooling exposure through MCP code generators, CI/CD setup, and frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts. However, the resume shows no formal people-management experience — no direct reports, no performance reviews, no team leadership title — which is the core requirement of this Level II Manager role. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also thin (some iOS/Apple TV work nearly a decade ago, no recent mobile build-system or infrastructure work).
strengths: Extensive developer-tools background: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, MCP code generators, and workshop instruction
13+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded — easily clears the 8-year minimum and the technical-leadership bar
Strong testing culture: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, Selenium course authorship, and recurring refactoring dojos demonstrate quality-engineering mindset
concerns: No formal people-management experience listed — no direct reports, no manager title, no 1:1s or performance-review responsibilities mentioned
Mobile-platform experience is dated and limited (iOS/Apple TV maintenance ~2015–2016); role centers on a major mobile ecosystem
Career trajectory is staff/senior IC and founder, not management — fit risk for a role explicitly focused on people leadership and roadmap ownership for a team
